blocks.text: Ruud Chases Barcelona Glory as Old Trafford Derby Ignites Monday Night

Monday delivers wall-to-wall drama: Casper Ruud hunts clay-court silverware in Barcelona, while a Premier League grudge match lights up Old Trafford. And Tuesday's Champions League nights are already casting their shadow.
🎾 Casper Ruud serves up clay magic at Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell — Norway's favourite surface star in action from 09:00
⚽ Leeds United at Manchester United — Yorkshire pride meets Red Devil desperation at Old Trafford; United (3rd, 55pts) need every point from 21:00

With Arsenal 15 points clear at the top, Manchester United's Champions League ambitions hang by a thread — a slip here could prove fatal. Leeds arrive hungry to humiliate their fiercest rivals on their own turf.
